description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a light beige fabric, featuring a chaise lounge extension on the right side. The sofa has clean, straight lines with broad, flat armrests and a low, boxy profile, giving it a contemporary and minimalist appearance. The seating area consists of two large seat cushions and three loose, square back cushions, all of which appear plush and generously padded for comfort. The armrests are at the same height as the backrest, creating a uniform silhouette around the perimeter. The sofa sits on small, barely visible legs, which slightly elevate it off the ground while maintaining a grounded look. The upholstery is solid in color with a smooth, matte finish and no visible decorative stitching or tufting.
description: A modern L-shaped beige sectional sofa with a chaise lounge, broad armrests, and plush loose cushions. The design is minimalist with smooth, solid upholstery and a low, boxy profile.
description_view_0: Front angle view showing the L-shape, chaise lounge on the right, and three loose cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the flat, broad armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, straight backrest and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the main seating area and the arrangement of cushions and armrest.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, square back cushions and two large seat cushions; cushions are uniform in size and not attached, with a sectional layout including a chaise extension.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, flat armrests at the same height as the backrest, straight profile with no decorative elements, fully padded and integrated into the sofa's boxy silhouette.
attribute_leg_design: Small, recessed legs barely visible from most angles, likely made of metal or plastic, positioned at the corners for support, minimalistic and unobtrusive.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with no segmentation, supporting three loose back cushions; no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery in light beige, smooth and matte with no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
